purpose: Apply state/shard_scope_reinforcement_plan_2026-04-27.md: insert `lint-exempt:` annotations into Plan A shards (auto-ingest / tooling / witness) and prepend canonical-root `Scope:` blocks to Plan B shards (genuine cross-repo corpus walks). Drive `tool/atlas_shard_scope_lint.hexa` from PASS=4/WARN=120/BLINDSPOT=9 toward PASS≥130/WARN≤2/BLINDSPOT=0 without touching atlas.n6 (L0) or modifying any factual shard content.

raw#73 honesty triad (OBSTRUCTION_DOCUMENTED for plan/disk drift)
raw#77 append-only (only header-level metadata added; no facts removed)
plan_authority_note: Plan summary text declared `Plan A row count: 102` but the actual Plan A markdown table contains 110 rows. Treated the table content (110) as authoritative since it is the per-shard list a maintainer mechanically applies. All 110 are mechanical lint-exempt insertions.

lint_after.scanned_growth_explanation: 5 new shards landed under n6/ from concurrent sessions during apply (anima-r49-or-r44-promotion, bench-orchestrator-smoke, n6arch-deep-uncited, tecsl-archive-deep-batch-2, plus one earlier). They are NOT in the 2026-04-27 reinforcement plan; per honesty constraint they were not silently processed. They account for 4 WARN + 1 BLINDSPOT in the residual count.

obstructions_documented.detail: Plan summary text says `Plan A row count: 102`, but the markdown table in §`Plan A` lists 110 atlas.append.*.n6 rows. Resolved by trusting the table (per-shard authoritative list). All 110 received the recommended lint-exempt line.

Plan B markdown table contains 26 rows; 8 are tagged `(Plan A)` cross-references for maintainer discoverability and one (`anima-boost-2026-04-27.n6`) is annotated `already PASS, no action`. The 18 unique Plan B targets were processed, matching `Plan B unique row count: 18`.

Five new atlas.append.*.n6 shards landed in n6/ during the apply window from concurrent agent sessions (consistent with parallel-cron repo memory note). These are NOT covered by the 2026-04-27 reinforcement plan — per honesty constraint, no silent annotation applied. They appear as 4 WARN + 1 BLINDSPOT residual: anima-r49-or-r44-promotion, bench-orchestrator-smoke, n6arch-deep-uncited, tecsl-archive-deep-batch-2 (+1 earlier counted in baseline).

Six Plan A shards (5 *-deeper-2026-04-26.n6 + cross-engine-meta-roadmap-2026-04-26.n6) lack a `═══` banner row, so the initial banner-anchored awk insertion missed them. Detected via post-Plan-A grep for `lint-exempt:`, then patched with a line-2 awk insertion. All 6 verified post-fix.
